description: Style NoteThis season's french connection line features bold prints in clutches with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe.Product DetailsBlack clutch with a main compartment with a zippered pocket, two separators and eight card slots Branding embossed on the frontMaterial and CareShell: 100% polyurethane and lining: 100% polyester Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 10 cmWidth: 19 cm
